context: Tests whether the agent correctly handles multi-leg flights with waypoints, resolves preferred airport codes, converts MDT to UTC, and includes all required flags.

checklist.name: Denver as KBJC
checklist.description: Uses KBJC as the origin airport code (Rocky Mountain Metropolitan, the user's preferred Denver airport)

checklist.name: Tonopah as KTPH or correct ICAO
checklist.description: Resolves Tonopah, Nevada to KTPH (Tonopah Airport) and places it as a waypoint between origin and destination

checklist.name: San Carlos as KSQL
checklist.description: Uses KSQL as the destination airport code (San Carlos Airport)

checklist.name: Waypoint ordering
checklist.description: Command has KBJC KTPH KSQL in the correct positional order (origin, waypoint, destination)

checklist.name: Correct UTC time
checklist.description: Departure time converted to 14:00 UTC (8 AM MDT = UTC-6, so 08:00 + 06:00 = 14:00)
